questionHtml: Explain the differences in the water loss rate in dark and light conditions.
markschemeHtml:
1. more water is lost during the day than at night;
  2. temperature is higher so more loss of water by evaporation;
  3. stomata are open for gas exchange/ photosynthesis (so more water can evaporate/transpire);

meta.title: Explain the differences in the water loss rate in dark and light conditions.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
